title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Malabar Gold & Diamonds is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Malabar Gold & Diamonds in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!
